texto: Laugh, laugh at all my dreams!What I dream shall yet come true!Laugh at my belief in man,At my belief in you.Freedom still my soul demands,Unbartered for a calf of gold.For still I do believe in man,And in his spirit, strong and bold.And in the future I still believeThough it be distant, come it willWhen nations shall each other bless,And peace at last the earth shall fill.
explicacao: Citação de Shaul Tchernichovsky sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “Laugh, laugh at all my dreams!What I dream shall yet come true!Laugh at my belief in man,At my be…” articula motivacao, belief, humanism em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e humanism.
